installed.name: core
installed.description: Framework-agnostic AI agent engine — agents, tools, storage, streaming, events

installed.name: weather-tool
installed.description: Get current weather information for any location using Open-Meteo API

installed.name: weather-agent
installed.description: Weather specialist agent using Open-Meteo API data

docs: Engine installed to your project. Import with: import { ... } from '@kitn/core'
The weather tool auto-registers on import. Use it directly or assign it to an agent.
The weather agent uses the weather tool to fetch and present weather data. Assign it to your server's agent registry.
